title: IIIT Hyderabad is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIIT Hyderabad is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIIT Hyderabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About IIIT Hyderabad:
IIIT Hyderabad is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
